education.school: University of California, San Diego, La Jolla, CA
education.degree: B.S. Data Science, Minor in Business Economics

bullets: Increased client acquisition for a 501(c)(3) small business microfinancing nonprofit by building and deploying key frontend pages (client stories, About Us, privacy policy) for a redesigned homepage with React.
Enabled content management by developing Express/MongoDB APIs to create, edit, and delete newsletter articles.
Drove user engagement by integrating a contact system with backend routing and custom email workflows.
Classified 10+ objects in harsh lighting and streamed detections by integrating a CNN with ROS2 and on-rover NPU.
Reduced latency by 70% vs. BFS by building an obstacle avoidance pipeline using Theta* over PointCloud2 data.
Enabled remote testing via a Webots-ROS2 simulation integrating 13 rover packages and a 60+ KB URDF.
Achieved 99.8% positional accuracy by combining satellite GPS with real-time 10Hz RTCM correction data.

experience.role: Data Science & Machine Learning Research Intern
bullets: Processed 1.4M KB FASTQ inputs into 13K-line CSVs with schema validation through Bash ETL pipelines.
Extracted regional signals from 12+ high-resolution videos with motion correction by tuning a CNN/TensorFlow model.
Achieved 79.08% accuracy on 807 features from 100+ patients by building L1-regularized logistic regression and tree-based models with k-fold cross-validation and GridSearchCV hyperparameter tuning.
Identified disease-associated taxa across 800+ bacteria through differential abundance analysis using DESeq2.
Reduced teacher prep time by 60% by building a file upload system integrating Google Cloud and Supabase storage.

Architected and implemented a full-stack dashboard system for 200+ users, designing PostgreSQL schemas and Express APIs for assignments, user management, file storage, gradebooks, and custom email notifications.
Secured role-based access in dashboards by developing middleware with cookie-based auth and permission gating.

Evaluated VDA 5050 API and fleet management feasibility by building a full-stack simulation platform using MQTT, JSON messaging, and agent-based modeling of grocery-store robotics scenarios (cleaning, restocking, etc.).
Simulated fleet communication and workflows via an MQTT-based network with structured packet exchange.
Delivered API analysis by leading a team of 3 developers and validating behavior across fleet management scenarios.
Improved user-facing LLM response efficiency by 140x by architecting an agentic backend with XML-prompted RAG chains integrated with Pinecone vector databases, intent routing, and structured outputs.
Enabled retrieval for 100K+ dental products with Playwright-based scraping pipelines integrated with cloud SQL.
Secured user data with role-scoped storage using IV-HMAC and integrated with per-message streaming memory.
Created 12+ external integrations (Ramp, Google Cloud, Microsoft) with Model Context Protocol infrastructure.
Built AI insurer support by architecting a multi-tenant Express/Supabase backend with structured data flows.
Engineered agentic LLM workflows with tool chaining, memory, and feedback loops for conversation handling.
Delivered multilingual meeting insights via an LLM system with streaming transcription and summarization.
Built a production MCP server integrating Google Suite and local SQL sources to support LLM workflows.

Reduced multi-platform task execution from 9 minutes to less than 1 minute by engineering prompt templates and agent pipelines enabling single-shot natural language automation of 20+ step medical and retail workflows.
Delivered 8+ LLM system capabilities (Natural Language-to-PostgreSQL, context injection, retrieval) while coordinating 4 developers across Agile sprints and client-facing technical reviews.
Delivered gamified safety training to 15,000+ students by building a scalable MERN-based EdTech platform.
Boosted engagement via interactive React modules with quizzes, animations, and state-driven user progression.
Implemented secure auth and persistent state using MongoDB and Firebase with session-based progress tracking.
Built backend services processing 1,030+ CRM records to extract summaries, sentiment, and action items.
Engineered a real-time NLP pipeline with prompt chaining and sliding context to enable bi-directional CRM sync.
Implemented OAuth 2.0 authentication, LLM and GoHighLevel (CRM) API token management, and backend validation (Postman testing, logging) to support secure app installation and reliable integrations.
Identified 40+ critical incidents in e-commerce analytics across device and geography segments by building hierarchical time-series models (Prophet, ARIMA, scikit-learn) on 1M+ row Parquet datasets.
Attributed temporal anomalies to key dimensions using subgroup error metrics, Pandas, and DBSCAN clustering.
Enabled data-driven decisions via Streamlit/Plotly dashboard visualizing anomaly trends and segment contributions.
